Post-procedure skin recovery biotech serums for professional aesthetic applications
notes: BENEV is a leading US professional aesthetics company specializing in mesenchymal stem cell (MSC)-derived exosome technology for skin rejuvenation and regeneration. Their flagship Exosome Regenerative Complex+ contains 2.5 billion MSC-derived exosomes per mL and is clinically used for post-procedure recovery, hair loss treatment, and advanced anti-aging protocols in professional settings. BENEV's combination of exosome actives with comprehensive growth factor formulations positions them as a premium SKIN-TWIN reference for the rapidly growing professional aesthetics biotech ingredients segment.
